task: Open the system Settings app and turn on Dark Mode.

steps.action: click the Settings icon in the dock
steps.screenshot: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='480' height='300'><rect width='480' height='300' fill='%23f4f4f5'/><rect x='0' y='276' width='480' height='24' fill='%23e4e4e7'/><circle cx='86' cy='246' r='14' fill='%236e56cf'/><circle cx='130' cy='246' r='14' fill='%2310b981'/><text x='12' y='28' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='%2318181b'>Desktop</text></svg>

steps.action: click the 'Appearance' row in the Settings sidebar
steps.screenshot: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='480' height='300'><rect width='480' height='300' fill='%23ffffff'/><rect width='160' height='300' fill='%23f4f4f5'/><text x='16' y='40' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='%2318181b'>General</text><text x='16' y='124' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='%236e56cf'>Appearance</text><text x='16' y='168' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='%2318181b'>Network</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='480' height='300'><rect width='480' height='300' fill='%23ffffff'/><rect width='160' height='300' fill='%23f4f4f5'/><text x='180' y='40' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='15' fill='%2318181b'>Appearance</text><text x='180' y='96' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='%2318181b'>Dark Mode</text><rect x='356' y='82' width='44' height='22' rx='11' fill='%236e56cf'/><circle cx='389' cy='93' r='9' fill='%23ffffff'/></svg>

task: Search the file browser for 'report.pdf' and open it.

steps.action: click the search field at the top of the window
steps.screenshot: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='480' height='300'><rect width='480' height='300' fill='%23ffffff'/><rect x='120' y='14' width='240' height='28' rx='6' fill='%23f4f4f5' stroke='%23e4e4e7'/><text x='132' y='33' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='%2371717a'>Search</text></svg>
